visualization.title: Number of course sections taught per building

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT c.building AS building,
       COUNT(cs.id) AS sections_count
FROM public.course_sections AS cs
JOIN public.classrooms AS c
  ON cs.classroom_id = c.id
WHERE cs.classroom_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.building
ORDER BY c.building ASC;

issues: If you want to exclude classrooms with a NULL building value, add WHERE c.building IS NOT NULL — current query only filters NULL classroom_id, not NULL building.
Y-axis title uses 'Sections count' (fine) but differs slightly from the question wording; consider 'Number of course sections' if you prefer exact match.
Bars are sorted by building name (matches ORDER BY c.building ASC). If you intended to sort by count, change the ordering to ORDER BY sections_count DESC.

visualization.title: Number of course sections taught per building

result.sql:
SELECT c.building AS building,
       COUNT(cs.id) AS sections_count
FROM public.course_sections AS cs
JOIN public.classrooms AS c
  ON cs.classroom_id = c.id
WHERE cs.classroom_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.building
ORDER BY c.building ASC;

issues: If you want to exclude classrooms with a NULL building value, add WHERE c.building IS NOT NULL — current query only filters NULL classroom_id, not NULL building.
Y-axis title uses 'Sections count' (fine) but differs slightly from the question wording; consider 'Number of course sections' if you prefer exact match.
Bars are sorted by building name (matches ORDER BY c.building ASC). If you intended to sort by count, change the ordering to ORDER BY sections_count DESC.
